summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DexScreener integration features for PROTOCOL ΔΣ vault system. All 22 test cases passed successfully, verifying new endpoints, security measures, mechanics, and regression compatibility.
passed_tests: Vault State Public - Returns valid payload with new dex fields, no target_combination exposed
Vault State Admin - Exposes admin-only fields including target_combination and dex details
Dex Config Off Mode - Successfully sets mode to 'off'
Dex Config Demo Mode - Sets demo mode with BONK token address
Dex Config Custom Mode - Handles custom mode with and without token_address
Dex Poll Off Mode - Returns {mode:'off', skipped:true} when disabled
Dex Poll Demo Mode - First poll establishes baseline (ticks_applied=0), subsequent polls apply symbolic ticks
Dex Poll Diagnostic Fields - Returns all 12 required diagnostic fields
Dex Mode Baseline Reset - Switching modes resets baselines (buys/sells/volume/carry)
Security Public Vault State - No admin fields exposed in public API
Security Admin Endpoints - All admin vault endpoints require JWT (401 without auth)
Regression Tests - All existing endpoints still functional
Hourly Tick Enabled - Background auto-tick system still operational
